title: chore(deps): update dependency webdriverio to v4.12.0 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [webdriverio](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) from `v4.9.8` to `v4.12.0`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v4.9.9`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v499-2017-11-20)

* bugfixes:
    * fix touchId command (#​2455)
    * enable support for both --inspect and --debug (#​2418)
* global changes:
    * docs improvements (#​2452, #​2449, #​2440)

---

### [`v4.9.10`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v4910-2017-11-27)

* bugfixes:
    * fix launcher run by node script as child process (#​2477)
    * check status code for WebDriver responses
    * allow usage of element as 1st citizen for getHTML and isVisibleWithinViewport
* global changes:
    * docs improvements (#​2472)

---

### [`v4.9.11`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v4911-2017-11-29)

* bugfixes:
    * better handling of failures in before hooks placed before any describe block (#​2259)
    * fix waitForVisible handling (#​2486)
* docs:
    * add Mochawesome reporter

---

### [`v4.10.0`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v4100-2018-01-10)

* bugfixes:
    * Fix for error handling on before/after hooks (#​2497)
    * fix debug functionality when using launcher programmatically (#​2492)
    * Fix issue when terminal doesn't support colors (#​2496)
* global changes:
    * docs improvements
    * fallbacks for depcrecated JsonWireProtocol commands (#​2493)
* wdio changes:
    * Add ability to specify a spec and suite (#​2505)
    * Add support for filtering specs #​2520

---

### [`v4.10.1`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v4101-2018-01-12)

* bugfixes:
    * fallback to old JSONWireProtocol commands when running Chromedriver

---

### [`v4.10.2`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v4102-2018-02-02)

* global changes:
    * docs improvements
* bugfixes:
    * better unknown command detection (#​2580)

---

### [`v4.11.0`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v4110-2018-02-27)

* global changes:
    * docs improvements
    * Add new selector strategies from WebdriverAgent (#​2613)
* bugfixes:
    * isVisibleWithinViewport check fix if element is not existing (#​2593)
    * propagate `process.execArgv` correctly
* wdio changes:
    * increase framework timeout if `--inspect` parameter is found in execArgv

---

### [`v4.12.0`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#v4120-2018-03-07)

* global changes:
    * docs improvements
    * allow to set `proxy` and `agent` request options
* wdio changes:
    * support for files with `.es6` ending

---

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>

-   [`413dd14`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/413dd14d990d408df9df0b8db6c868aac7adcda8) update changelog
